/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/llama-convert-llama2c-to-ggml.dir/convert-llama2c-to-ggml.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-convert-llama2c-to-ggml  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/granvalenti/Work/tecnologia-sota/tlama/lmcode/clean/bin ../../common/libcommon.a ../../bin/libllama.0.0.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-metal.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.9.8.dylib ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security
